name: Jungle Runner   Animal Dash
description: Panda Jungle Run is a fast-paced, fun, and colorful endless runner where you control a cheerful panda racing through a lively jungle world. Run across bamboo bridges, leap over fallen tree trunks, dodge wild animals, and collect shiny bamboo coins as the jungle gets faster and more challenging. Designed with a third-person camera and a bright cartoon art style, the game delivers smooth, arcade-style gameplay that’s easy to learn but hard to master.
instructions: A Left Arrow for left D Right Arrow for right Space W for jump
